1782351028509.title: Scenes should only either progress character or progress plot

fleeting_notes.text: Using AI to cut cost isn't cost cutting, it's quality cutting. Human work should be seen as a cost of doing business, not a non-essential expense
A scene moves from A to B. There for the ending of the scene must be the revelation and the "point" of the scene.
